name: flask-web-app
test_expectations: pytest covers health/config/start routes with Flask test_client
build_expectations: python syntax/import check succeeds and Dockerfile or WSGI entrypoint exists
docs_expectations: README documents routes, configuration, local run, verification and deployment
config_expectations: .env.example lists runtime env vars; public config endpoints expose no secrets
security_expectations: no secrets committed; security headers and input validation are present for public routes
ci_expectations: CI installs Python dependencies and runs pytest plus import/build validation
